subcodes.first_line: O Badi'! The mature ones have not attained unto the traces of the Most Exalted Pen, yet thou hast attained. Grace and bounty lie within His grasp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بدیع بالغین باثر قلم اعلی فائز نشدند و تو فائز شدی فضل و عنایت در قبضه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
